title.en: Congo Fastener Supplier: Oil, Mining & Construction Hardware
title.zh: 刚果共和国紧固件供应商：石油、采矿和建筑五金

description.en: Republic of Congo fastener supplier serving Brazzaville, Pointe-Noire, and Dolisie. Oil industry, mining and construction fasteners. Shipping via Pointe-Noire port. Factory prices with OMC certified products.
description.zh: 刚果共和国紧固件供应商，服务于布拉柴维尔、蓬蒂诺瓦和多多ussi。石油工业、采矿和建筑紧固件。通过蓬蒂诺瓦港运输。工厂价格，OMC认证产品。

keywords: Congo fastener supplier, Brazzaville hardware, Pointe-Noire port shipping, Republic of Congo oil fasteners, Congo mining hardware, OMC certified, Central Africa fastener supplier, construction hardware Congo

heading.en: Republic of Congo: Oil, Mining & Construction Hub
heading.zh: 刚果共和国：石油、采矿和建筑中心

body.en: The Republic of Congo (Congo-Brazzaville) is a key player in Central Africa's oil sector and growing mining industry. With oil revenues funding infrastructure development, construction activity in Brazzaville and Pointe-Noire is increasing rapidly. TradeGo Fasteners supplies quality fasteners for the oil and gas sector (drilling platforms, pipelines), mining operations (potash, iron ore), and commercial construction. Our Pointe-Noire port-based logistics ensure efficient imports for Congolese businesses.
body.zh: 刚果共和国（中非）是中非石油行业的关键参与者，采矿业也在增长。随着石油收入资助基础设施建设，布拉柴维尔和蓬蒂诺瓦的建筑活动正在快速增长。TradeGo紧固件为石油和天然气行业（钻井平台、管道）、采矿作业（钾肥、铁矿石）和商业建筑提供优质紧固件。我们以蓬蒂诺瓦港为基础的物流确保为刚果企业提供高效进口。

heading.en: Shipping to Republic of Congo: Pointe-Noire Port
heading.zh: 运送到刚果共和国：蓬蒂诺瓦港

body.en: Pointe-Noire is the economic capital and main port of Republic of Congo. We ship fasteners from China to Pointe-Noire port (transit time: 25-30 days), then distribute throughout the country by road. Key routes: Pointe-Noire to Brazzaville (5-7 days by road), Pointe-Noire to Dolisie (3-4 days), and cross-border to parts of Gabon and the DRC. We handle all documentation including Direction Générale des Douanes et Droits Indirects (DGDDI) requirements.
body.zh: 蓬蒂诺瓦是刚果共和国的经济首都和主要港口。我们从中国将紧固件运送到蓬蒂诺瓦港（运输时间：25-30天），然后通过公路分销到全国各地。主要路线：蓬蒂诺瓦到布拉柴维尔（公路5-7天），蓬蒂诺瓦到多多ussi（3-4天），以及跨境到加蓬和刚果金的部分地区。我们处理所有文件，包括海关和间接税总局（DGDDI）的要求。

heading.zh: 刚果关键行业的紧固件

rows: Pipeline flanges, stud bolts, SS fasteners
High-tensile bolts, rock anchors, liner bolts

q.en: What is the shipping time to Pointe-Noire?
q.zh: 到蓬蒂诺瓦的运输时间是多少？

a.en: Sea freight from China to Pointe-Noire takes approximately 25-30 days. Road transport to Brazzaville adds 5-7 days.
a.zh: 从中国海运到蓬蒂诺瓦大约需要25-30天。公路运输到布拉柴维尔再加5-7天。

a.en: We can provide documentation for OMC (Organisation Nationale du Commerce Extérieur) requirements and assist with customs clearance.
a.zh: 我们可以提供OMC（国家对外贸易组织）要求的文件，并协助海关清关。

author: TradeGo Fasteners
